heading: Service of process
label: 22310 Service of process
text: The corporation shall have a designated agent in the District of Columbia to receive service of process for the corporation. Notice to or service on the agent, or mailed to the business address of the agent, is notice to or service on the corporation.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2231036:3405(b)., , .Oct. 15, 1962Pub. L. 87–817, § 5(b)76 Stat. 930The words “at all times” and “authorized” are omitted as unnecessary.
